channel.title: Release Hardening on Mi&Bee Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Release Hardening on Mi&Bee Blog

item.title: MiBeeNvr v0.7.0: Timelapse v2 + Dual-Lens Xiaomi + H.265 Muxing + Release Hardening
item.description: After v0.6.0 put the timelapse pipeline in place, community feedback quickly pointed out several hard problems: the JPEG sequence consumed too much storage, H.265 cameras couldn’t generate playable timelapse segments, dual-lens Xiaomi devices could only capture the main lens, and H.265 HLS would occasionally panic outright. None of these are edge cases — the dual-lens CW500 and Outdoor Cam 4 ship in large volumes in China, and H.265 is the de facto standard for mid-to-high-end cameras. The v0.7.0 mainline was built around exactly this feedback.
